configuration.summary: figma needs a Figma REST API token via ~/.pi/figma/config.json with { "apiToken": "..." }, FIGMA_ACCESS_TOKEN, or another documented migration fallback.

files.description: Optional Figma credential file containing { "apiToken": "..." }. fh-agent does not generate it because it contains a token.

usage.summary: Ask the agent to inspect Figma links in natural language, or call figma_context when you need exact mode control.

tools.name: figma_context
tools.summary: Compatibility context tool for overview or focused screen summaries.

tools.name: figma_parse_url
tools.summary: Parse Figma URLs, file keys, and node IDs.

tools.name: figma_auth_status
tools.summary: Check local token discovery and optional file access without printing secrets.

tools.name: figma_get_design_context
tools.summary: Return compact page, frame, and nearby design context.

tools.name: figma_get_node_summary
tools.summary: Summarize a specific node's layout, styles, text, components, and children.

tools.name: figma_get_implementation_context
tools.summary: Return design-to-code layout, typography, color, spacing, asset, and accessibility hints.

tools.name: figma_extract_text
tools.summary: Extract visible text nodes from a file or node.

tools.name: figma_find_nodes_by_name
tools.summary: Search node names with compact path-aware results.

tools.name: figma_find_nodes_by_text
tools.summary: Search visible text content.

tools.name: figma_render_nodes
tools.summary: Return render URLs or safe downloaded artifacts for selected nodes.

tools.name: figma_extract_assets
tools.summary: Build a compact asset manifest for renderable nodes and image fills.

tools.name: figma_get_styles
tools.summary: List file styles.

tools.name: figma_get_variables
tools.summary: List variables and collections when scopes allow.

tools.name: figma_get_components
tools.summary: List file components.

tools.name: figma_get_component_sets
tools.summary: List file component sets.

tools.name: figma_search_components
tools.summary: Search components by name.

tools.name: figma_get_comments
tools.summary: Read comments when token scopes allow.

tools.name: figma_get_image_fills
tools.summary: Retrieve expiring image-fill URLs.

tools.name: figma_get_file_raw
tools.summary: Capped raw file JSON escape hatch for debugging.

tools.name: figma_get_nodes_raw
tools.summary: Capped raw node JSON escape hatch for debugging.
